prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the financial health and operational aspects of private registered providers (PRPs) of social housing, which predominantly operate in England. It discusses regulations, policies, and figures related to housing development and affordability that are specific to the English housing market.
